name: Kit Kat
notes: DB has King Size (3oz = 420 cal). Standard single bar is 1.5 oz = 210 cal. King Size is roughly 2x the standard bar, so 420 cal checks out for King Size. Standard bar should be added as a separate entry.

name: Twix
notes: DB has King Size (3.02oz = 440 cal). Standard single package is 1.79 oz = 250 cal (contains 2 cookie bars). King Size would contain 4 cookie bars. At ~125 cal per cookie, King Size 440 cal is plausible (3.5 cookies worth). Standard bar should be added.

name: Snickers (Standard)
notes: DB value of 250 cal for 1.86 oz is confirmed correct.

name: Snickers (King Size)
notes: DB value of 440 cal is confirmed. King Size contains 2 bars at 220 cal each (2 servings per package). Note some sources list Snickers Sharing Size at 3.29 oz separately.

name: Hershey's Milk Chocolate
notes: DB has King Size (2.6oz = 370 cal). Standard bar is 1.55 oz = 220 cal. King Size 2.6 oz is ~1.68x the standard bar; 220 * 1.68 = ~370, so King Size value checks out. Some sources report 210 cal for older formulation. Standard bar should be added.

name: Reese's Peanut Butter Cups
notes: DB has King Size 4-cup pack (2.8oz = 400 cal). Standard 2-pack is 1.5 oz = 210 cal. King Size is 2x the standard (4 cups vs 2 cups), so 210 * 2 = 420 cal. DB value of 400 may be slightly low for King Size; Hershey's site suggests 420 cal for 2.8 oz King Size. Standard 2-pack should be added.

name: M&M's Peanut
notes: DB says 480 cal but verified data shows 3 servings x 140 cal = 420 cal for the entire 3.27 oz bag. Each serving is ~31g (about 12 pieces). Per serving: 140 cal, 7g fat, 16g carbs, 5g protein, 1g fiber, 14g sugar. DB is OVERESTIMATING by 60 cal.

name: Skittles Original
notes: DB value of 440 cal confirmed. 4 servings at 110 cal each. Per serving (1 oz/28g): 110 cal, 1g fat, 26g carbs, 0g protein, 0g fiber, 21g sugar.

name: Sour Patch Kids
notes: DB says 360 cal. Verified: 3.5 servings x 110 cal/serving = 385 cal for the entire box. Per serving (12 pieces): 110 cal, 0g fat, 27g carbs, 0g protein, 0g fiber, 24g sugar. DB is UNDERESTIMATING by ~25 cal. Note: if label says 3 servings, total = 330 cal.

name: Sour Patch Watermelon
notes: DB says 150 cal for 11 pieces/40g. Multiple sources show 140 cal per serving of 11 pieces (39g). DB is overestimating by 10 cal. Some older labels may have said 150.

name: Jolly Rancher Hard Candy
verified_serving: 3 pieces (18g) = 70 cal; 1 piece (6g) = 23 cal; 4 pieces = ~93 cal
notes: DB says 4 pieces = 93 cal. Official serving is 3 pieces = 70 cal (23.3 cal/piece). 4 x 23.3 = 93.3 cal, rounds to 93. Confirmed correct.

name: Haribo Goldbears
notes: DB value of 100 cal for 13 pieces/30g is confirmed. Standard grab bags are 4-5 oz share size.

name: Swedish Fish
notes: DB says ~30g = 105 cal. Official serving is 7 pieces (40g) = 140 cal. At 30g, proportional calories = 105 cal (140 * 30/40). DB is technically correct for its stated weight but should be updated to standard label serving of 40g = 140 cal.

name: Trolli Sour Brite Crawlers
notes: DB says ~28g = 91 cal. Official serving is 8 pieces (30g) = 100 cal. At 28g, proportional calories = ~93 cal. DB is close but should be updated to standard serving of 30g = 100 cal.
